name: explain-concept
description: Take a complex topic and produce layered explanations at different expertise levels (ELI5 through expert).

topic.description: The concept or topic to explain

context.description: Why the person is asking (helps tailor the explanation)

steps.template:
**Level 3 — Intermediate (working knowledge):**
- Technical details and tradeoffs
- Common pitfalls and misconceptions
- How it relates to adjacent concepts
- Practical usage example

**Level 4 — Expert (deep understanding):**
- Implementation details and edge cases
- Performance characteristics and complexity
- Historical context and design decisions
- Current research / open problems
- Comparison with alternative approaches

**Quick Reference Card:**
- One-line definition
- Key properties (3-5 bullet points)
- When to use / when not to use
- Common confusions (X is NOT Y)
- Further reading (2-3 resources per level)
